scores.correctness_notes: Fully matches gold standard on all fields, roles, and semantics. Correctly identifies interface as required, limit as integer, optional as boolean defaulting false, scope as global/container.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor: states interface 'cannot start with a hyphen' — gold standard says only a-z and hyphens allowed (implying it can't start with hyphen, but this specific rule isn't in gold standard). Also states optional is 'informational only — Juju does not enforce it' which is an addition not in the gold standard but plausible. Small note: gold standard says optional 'should always be explicitly included other than for peers' but agent doesn't mention this recommendation.
